nasb.text: He says, “You are My war-club, My weapon of war; And with you I shatter nations, And with you I destroy kingdoms.

esv.text: “You are my hammer and weapon of war: with you I break nations in pieces; with you I destroy kingdoms;

cnv.text: 耶和華說：“你是我的鐵鎚， 作我的兵器； 我用你們打碎列國， 用你毀滅萬邦。

ccb.text: 耶和华说： “巴比伦啊！你是我的锤子， 我作战的兵器， 我要用你打碎列国， 毁灭列邦。
